description: Diagnose and fix job submission errors

causes: You are on Basic plan and selected VLA — wizard reverts to LLM on Basic
Missing required wizard fields — scroll up to check for red validation errors
Account or org permission issue — confirm you are logged into the correct org
Start Training button disabled.fix: Check plan in Settings → Billing. Ensure all required wizard fields are filled. Confirm org context.

causes: Org credit balance is zero or below the minimum threshold to start a job
Insufficient credits.fix: Go to Settings → Billing → Buy Credits and purchase a credit pack. Bronze pack ($10) is the minimum for a short test run.

causes: A model with the same output name already exists in your org
Job already exists.fix: Choose a different Output Model Name in the wizard's launch step. Names must be unique within your org.

causes: Your plan's concurrency limit is reached — another job is still active
Maximum concurrent jobs reached.fix: Wait for an existing job to reach Completed, Failed, or Cancelled before launching a new one. Check active jobs in your org's model list.

causes: You are on the Basic plan — VLA fine-tuning requires Plus or Pro
VLA locked on wizard.fix: Go to Pricing in the Hub navbar and upgrade to Plus ($20/mo) or Pro ($100/mo). After upgrading, refresh the wizard.

description: Diagnose and fix dataset and integration failures

causes: Text Field column name does not match any column in the dataset
Dataset repo ID is wrong or dataset is private and Hub can't access it
LLM job fails at Initializing — dataset.fix: Open your HuggingFace dataset page → Dataset Viewer → inspect column headers. Correct the Text Field value in the wizard to exactly match. If dataset is private, ensure it's accessible or make it public.

causes: Camera Feeds count in the wizard does not match the dataset's actual camera count
VLA job fails at Provisioning — camera m.fix: Open your HuggingFace dataset page → Files → meta/info.json. Count keys in 'features' that start with 'observation.images'. Set Camera Feeds to that exact number and relaunch.

causes: Selected GPU has insufficient VRAM for the model + camera count combination
A10 24GB was selected (always insufficient for VLA fine-tuning)
VLA job fails at Provisioning — VRAM err.fix: Switch to A100 40GB or H100 80GB. For Pi0.5 or GR00T N1.5 with 3+ cameras, use A100 80GB or H100 80GB.

causes: HF token is invalid or lacks write permission
Repository name format is wrong (missing slash)
HuggingFace push fails after training.fix: Verify token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens — it needs write scope. Format must be username/model-name. The repo is created automatically if it doesn't exist — double-check the slash separator.

causes: W&B API token is invalid or expired
W&B integration fails.fix: Verify token at wandb.ai/settings. Create the target project in W&B before launching the job.

causes: Dataset was not recorded with solo robo --record or the LeRobot library
Dataset not LeRobot-compatible (VLA).fix: Use solo robo --record (CLI) to create a LeRobot-compatible dataset. Alternatively, use the LeRobot datasets library to convert your existing data. Verify meta/info.json exists in your dataset repo.
